example_questions: Cual es el correo electronico de contacto de EKIN indicado en el manual?
A quien pertenecen los derechos de autor del manual?
query_types.notes: Entity anchored lookups over company/contact snippets and single literals.

example_questions: Para que sirve el manual de la brochadora A218 / RASHEM - 7x3000x500?
query_types.notes: Currently mostly supported through bounded text snippets rather than explicit functional properties.

example_questions: Que se debe verificar regularmente para garantizar la seguridad de la maquina?
query_types.notes: Single entity to descriptive text/value lookups.

example_questions: Segun que directiva se realiza la declaracion CE de conformidad sobre maquinas?
Que objetivo tienen los simbolos de advertencia y seguridad del manual?
query_types.notes: Requires following explicit compliance or maintenance links, not only text search.

example_questions: Que figura muestra la informacion que aparece en los encabezados y pies de pagina del manual?
query_types.notes: Manual or component reference to figure/document nodes plus their descriptions.
Explicit component-to-component relations such as controla/tieneComponente.

example_questions: Que regla lineal queda controlada por un componente de la Columna_46?
query_types.notes: True multi-hop traversal over structural relations is already present and should become benchmarked.
